rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Tax Costs is continued to March 20, 2020 for parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of all filings in support of an in opposition to the motion to strike. Courtesy copies to be delivered by 4:00 p.m. on February 14, 2020 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ ET AL VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment is DENIED, triable issues of fact exists as to nuisance. rulings.Case Title: XIAOMEI FENG ET AL VS. JIAWEI JIAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer is continued to March 12, 2020 to provide parties a final opportunity to submit ALL courtesy copies. The Court received a Courtesy copy of the Demurrer filed on May 15, 2019 and Amended Notice of Demurrer filed on January 7, 2020. No courtesy copy of the opposition or the operative complaint was received. Courtesy copy of the opposition and the operative complaint to be delivered to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than February 14, 2020 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF BRIAN SMITH MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Counsel to prepare order. No opposition filed. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: 547-551 HAYES LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. PUBLIC BIKES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF 547-551 HAYES LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Motion For Assignment Order is GRANTED as requested. Defendant may seek an order terminating this assignment if necessary and proper upon the resolution of Defendant's Petition for Judicial Supervision of Voluntary Winding up and Dissolution of Corporation. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: BETHANY MONGEAU VS. ANDREW MCCORD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT ANDREW MCCORD DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the ninth cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the cause of action for breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing is available in landlord-tenant cases. Demurrer to the twelves cause of action for fraud is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege specific misrepresentations made with knowledge of falsity and intent to defraud. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: BETHANY MONGEAU VS. ANDREW MCCORD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Andrew Mccord To Strike Allegations Of Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Mahfam Sadeghi In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT ANDREW MCCORD Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Andrew Mccord To Strike Allegations Of Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Complaint is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to show reckless disregard of tenant's rights. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: BRICKENDOWN LLC VS. DALIA QUEZADA RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 13, 2019 line 11. PLAINTIFF BRICKENDOWN LLC Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount requested to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/SKF)
